name: 3pc Woven Flower Kids' Wall Décor Set - Pillowfort™
description: Bring the warmth and joy of the outdoors to your kid's room with this 3-Piece Woven Flower Kids' Wall Décor Set from Pillowfort™. This set includes three pieces of paper wall decor designed in the shape of elegant flowers. The light brown flowers boast a woven pattern for an earthy look, and they feature a loop at the back to hang them easily, making home styling a breeze.
